authors: Political Behavior, and Public Opinion Quarterly.
raw_title: How National Cues Polarize Perceptions of Political Figures
title_en: How National Cues Polarize Perceptions of Political Figures
title_zh: 国家线索如何极化政治人物的感知
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了国家线索（如总统的言论或国家象征）如何影响人们对政治人物的看法，并可能导致观点更加两极分化。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how national cues, such as presidential statements or national symbols, influence people's perceptions of political figures and can lead to more polarized views.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播与公众舆论中的极化现象
research_direction_en: Polarization in political communication and public opinion
